review_title: Manage your Human Resources Efficiently
description: As a user, I am super delighted to use this software because it enables me to manage my team very efficiently. It reminds me of performance management of mine as well as my team. In addition to these, it allows you to request for any HR related letters and it reaches you on time without wasting your time physically.
author: Md. R.
pros: I. Easy to use and very user-friendly for the HR guys as well as for the employees. II. Specific role creation as of the role profile ( ensuring proper delegation of authority). III. Real time update of the HR data. IV. Performance management system. V. Hiring or contracting and leaver management. VI. Compensation and benefit management. VII. Identifying the development needs of the employees and prioritizing the training program for the top loss.
cons: I am extremely happy with this software and didn't find anything that I would not like.

review_title: SAP HXC Suite : everything in a glance
description: SAP Success Factor provide a huge boost for human resource dapartment activities.
author: Luca S.
pros: The best feature is the native integration with other SAP tools that allow you to leverage the existing data stored in the company's central instance
cons: Solutuon is not fully usable in all kind of devices. Often pages are not designed efficiently and the elements are not formatted properly to be used in a mobile devices.

review_title: SuccessFactors a little outdated
description: utilizing SuccessFactors for applicant tracking, job, postings, goal-setting, and it’s training platform integration are good but the environment or GUI could use an overhaul
author: Gabe A.
pros: Suite is accessible on mobile platform increasing training adherence.
cons: Platform is clunky and software environment is something out of the early 2000’s

review_title: One of the best HRM tool in the software market.
description: It has been an excellent experience using this software and highly recommend this for HR management.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite simplifies the process of hire till retire, helps easily onboard the candidates, manage their profiles and then termination is done on the same tool.
cons: SAP SuccessFactors HXM Suite needs certain improvements such as position based permissions, which is currently limited to role based permissions.

review_title: Maintain trainings and ensure qualified employees
author: Maarten B.
pros: Tracking uneasy without using paper folders and signatures.
cons: I really do not have any cons. The software suits out needs.

review_title: Middle of the road
description: Poor for an ease of use and easy to find what i need to do. It has potential but is frustrating. The formatting of objectives look v different on screen as you enter them to what they look like once entered. Needs more structure. Plus output reports dont exist so we (as a dept) copy each individuals details or the year into a ppt slide for each individual at the end of the year. An excel or sharepoint workflow is cheaper and more effective from a users pov.
author: Liz H.
pros: Its a positive move to have a system for performance management and objective setting available on yoir computer and mobile
cons: Its complicated. Its not focused on users. Its not intuitive. The ways to access different elements of the system to change employee flags, see updates in the workflow and use the system are scattered around the page. Some on the top, some on the left, one half way down the page. I waste a lot of time trying to find what im needing to do. Really does need taking apart and reengingeering with easy or use for the user.

review_title: The best software for HR professionals
description: My experience was very good, it is just what I received and I cannot complain, I would like it to be better but with the advancement of technologies this may change, those changes I would like to see and allow me to automate everything.
author: Jhon S.
pros: The ease of use and its interface is very simple for those who have or not experience with the software
cons: I did not find something that I did not like, perhaps scaling the connection with artificial intelligence, it would be ideal to be able to connect all this with automated learning
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Works well with other SAP products
author: Naveesh B.
pros: Ease of looking at vacation details and requesting them. Also easy to keep track of compensation and your profile
cons: The direct deposit details update can be a bit easier to access and navigate
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Terrific tool; every business should have such an application
description: It's been a very welcomed interaction. I would have liked having this tool at my previous employers.
author: Michael C.
pros: Intuitively simple. Comfortable design; not overwhelming. A central hub for other pertinent applications; one stop shop.
cons: Nothing to convey here. The only issues I've had have been connectivity issues due to internal security protocols.

review_title: Successfactor Review
description: We are very happy with this suite and using it from last 2 years. Have done multiple integrations and customisation satisfactorily
author: Ravikumar K.
pros: I like the complete end to end visibility of Employee details and canditates tracking with lots of workflows built into the system
cons: Cost is the major factor as it impacts on the decision making process

review_title: SAP SuccessFactors for all payroll related information
description: SAP SuccessFactors is very useful for viewing all documents related to payroll, view complete employee information such as manager details , work location ,team mates info and is also very useful for completing all e-learning assigned
author: Sneha K.
pros: SAP SuccessFactors is helpful for viewing all the details regarding salary compensation and to view and complete all the merit increase processes and statement's. All the documents related to salary can b easily downloaded, SuccessFactors sis also used for completing all e-Learning modules assigned by the manager
cons: The overall responsiveness of the UI is a bit slow

review_title: Good people management
description: Step w learning curve but once you understand things it’s ok
author: Sandy F.
pros: Integrated will into existing systems and process
cons: Can be a bit difficult to set up initially
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Success factors builds healthy environment to work
description: Excellent software to implement & use in any type of industry as it manages multiple things in single software.
author: Pranav S.
pros: It's ease of use and mobile accessibility are the most important factors about this software, which I liked the most. It's provides one click access to payrolls,income tax , attendance, training related information.
cons: Sometimes it takes very much time to respond to sudden commands , which makes process bit slower.

review_title: All you Need as Employee is Here
author: Ashok K.
pros: It helps to manage All Employee information safely.Easy to access and submit their concerns like applying leaves, payroll management, Searching for internal job can be done by themselves.Time Sheet Management is good, In that more options available so that we can mention easily.Available in system and Mobile which is super good.
cons: HR policy tab should be pre designed, so that employee get everything clearly.

review_title: Really consider whether you need your HRIS and Talent Management system to be one in the same
description: If you think you need a single HRIS and Talent Management System, there aren't that many options, so SuccessFactors will likely be on your shortlist. My recommendation would be to really consider whether you "need" that, or whether you would be better off with SuccessFactors as your HRIS and opt instead for niche applications for your various talent management needs that can integrate with each other and SuccessFactors.
author: Sandy K.
pros: SuccessFactors offers an HRIS with modules to cover many aspects of Talent Management, including Recruiting, Onboarding, LMS, Goals, Performance, Succession Planning, Compensation, and Workforce Analytics.
cons: Several of the modules have been bolted on over the years and are still not fully integrated like you might expect them to be. The look and feel of the modules are dated and there has been very little in the way of enhancements to the talent modules in the 6 years I have been using it. Built-in reports are limited. SAP Support has been poor. There are still many aspects of the configuration that can only be done in the back-end provisioning client by a configuration partner (not by the client), so the client can never truly be self-sufficient.

review_title: SAP SuccessFactors HCM Suite in my life
description: Every week I issue notes with a repair nature and it is a very easy task to be performed by SAP. For 2 days a week I need to make inquiries of bank details from suppliers and change addresses and emails and it is also an easy activity whose platform facilitates reading and changing data.
author: Yasmim P.
pros: What I like most about this site is the speed of loading each function and page opened, in addition to supporting several open at the same time. But more important is the amount of functions available for use, such as inventory control, supplier search, payment collection, among others.
cons: Sometimes it's kind of hard to find a search function I need and I end up having to question my colleagues even though I've had access to the site for years.

review_title: Good Core HRIS - but nothing more than that
description: Poor to non existent customer service, with poor additional modules not worth using (much better to use best of breed tech and integrate it into SF via API or SFTP), but a decent Core HRIS for larger organisations.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For a Core HRIS, it's a solid system. A little complicated in use, but nevertheless, core HRIS data is well structured and reportable.
cons: Additional modules are basic to poor in quality. Recruitment module is a 5/10 - does the very basic stuff, but that's it. Very reactive recruitment focus, relying on job board posts to fill jobs. Non existent functionality - in terms of them actually being useful - re talent pools, searching the database, integrating with other tech etc. I couldn't also recommend the Performance module - too complicated and not liked amongst users. Talent module not worth it at all. Etc etc.

review_title: User Experience on SAP HXM Suite
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The HXM suite covers all the features of payroll, HR, recruiting , training, onboarding within a company , Since it covers all the features which is necessary for a company to function , buying the suite makes sense.
cons: The user experience is not that great , to it comparison Workday is very smooth.

review_title: Horrible UX, hight cost and lacking features (Recruiting module)
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nothing compared to modern ATS´s like Ponty, Workable, Teamtailor, GreenHouse etc. A nice "tell" is that during demo videos (created by actual fans/users on Youtube) the product lags and there is pauses every now and then since the pages have to load and you have to wait. Acceptable 10 years ago, not so much in 2018.
cons: - Crap UX: Means many clicks = drags down productivity - Setting up processes or adding a step is an actual project. Something that takes less then 2 minutes with any of the systems above - No data visualization (unless extra module is bought). Data is everything! And it´s a really unmodern and slow process to create specific reports (again, a project in itself), and then you get a report where have to take the data and maunally use your own tools to visualize your findings. - This is like a 15 years old recruitment system BUT it´s also expensive and you have to hire extra staff as trainers since the UX is so bad so this ads even more to the total cost. - No built in surveys. For instance if you want to check your candidate experience and such. The list goes on but you get the picture.

review_title: SuccessFactors has opportunities to improve
description: We had a poor experience with SuccessFactors. I had a similar experience in a past position. So, this poor experience was a repeat. Performance management module required more effort from administrators and managers to set up, write reviews, deliver to staff etc. Support really liked gamification and we didn't create enough about gamification. We cared about giving the right feedback to staff so they can grow and prosper. It appeared that SuccessFactors was competing with Facebook while we wanted it to compete with Gallup. Support and billing from their side needs to improve. When exiting SuccessFactors, we weren't treated well. SAP is in a great position to focus on changing people's emotions about SuccessFactors. I can totally see its potentials. SAP needs to take a different approach with the product and support.
author: Chirag S.
pros: The best feature of SuccessFactors was that it was a operationally stable, cloud-native software when competitors were finding their footings with SaaS model and ensuring high availability. SuccessFactors had figured the technology out sooner than competition and our team didn't have to worry about hosting.
cons: Modules in SuccessFactors appeared to be scattered and cobbled together inefficiently. It appeared that employee data got copied over to payroll module. Performance data was copied from one year to another. It just seemed like a trailer/mobile home put piecemeal'ed together using plastic, wood, metal, soil and broken wheels from trucks and motorcycles were put underneath the trailer/mobile home, but the paint looked uniform and hid these inefficiencies. SAP has a great opportunity to turn this around since their foundational infrastructure is solid.

review_title: SAP HCM
description: Payroll and Legal Reporting is near perfection, although with challenges (at least PT Location has challenges on the legal report side. All the HR information is gathered in one place, which allows for reporting and analytics to be deep and accurate.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Talent management analytics: which allows for employee skill/qualification analysis;
cons: The learning curve of usability is a bit steep, although when you get the hang of it you won't believe how effective this software is.

review_title: Many features but hard to use
author: Norman W.
pros: - Employees familiar with SAP in other use-cases will have an easier time adapting to this version of the software. - Reporting functionality if powerful and capable to dealing with large amounts of data and pulling what data looked like on a particular time-frame.
cons: - Administrator interface is not intuitive and has a steep learning curve in order to use it. Requires a significant amount of time to train new administrators. - Learner portal is not well laid out and can be confusing for new employees.

review_title: SAP SuccessFactors - The HR Platform
description: SAP SuccessFactors was one stop solution for all the requirements related to HR.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SAP SuccessFactors is a total one stop solution for almost all the HR functions such as Employee on-boarding, Performance Management, Payroll etc.
cons: As SAP SuccessFactors has a lot if functions and rolls, it is found little bit confusing to operate. If the main options made simplified, it will be great.
author_profession: Assistant Manager - IT Network and Operations

review_title: SAP? Nope?
description: The base its there, but unless you are running SAP everywhere it does not scale well.
author: Michael D.
pros: SAP is amazing in one thing, they have an incredible amount of software, I mean they build their entire enterprise on that! Success Factors is one of them, it is a HR management/training software. Many companies use it.
cons: However they are not very good at maintaining it. Success factors is prone to missing information, subpar support, and just straight up madness. I've had to handle tickets consecutively of missing information and just over all. It looks like a software out of 2003. It is simply garbage. It will not sync well with systems. My god its horrible. Please stay away

review_title: Decent but outdated compare to others
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The software integrated with other SAP tools which provide more choices for HR professionals to have everything in one go. It is also customizable depending on your organisation process/requirements.
cons: As it involves several different software it can be bit unstable at times specially during upgrades period
